evals.name: redundant-radio-reliability
evals.prompt: Calculate the 1-year system reliability for a communication link with two redundant radios. Each radio has a failure rate of 500 FITs (failures per 10^9 hours). Does this meet a 99.9% reliability requirement?
evals.expected_output: A report showing the calculation for parallel reliability and confirming if it meets the 99.9% threshold.
